articles.title: XRP Set To Outshine Gold? Analyst Predicts 1,000% Surge
articles.description: A well-known analyst made an intriguing assumption about the rise of XRP, saying that it could potentially outdo the Philadelphia Gold and Silver Index. Egrag Crypto predicted that XRP could rise by 1,000% against the gold and silver index as the analyst sees the crypto replicating a run it made in 2017. Related Reading: Dogecoin To $1.35? articles.title: WikiLeaks receives 711 ETH donation that warns of ‘mind control chips’
articles.description: A mystery programmer who also burned a further 600 ETH claims that bosses from a Chinese hedge fund “used brain-computer weapons” The post WikiLeaks receives 711 ETH donation that warns of ‘mind control chips’ appeared first on Protos.

articles.title: Banking Giant JPMorgan Chase Holds $1,016,728 in Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs, According to New SEC Filing
articles.description: Financial Services titan JPMorgan Chase is holding over $1 million worth of shares in Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) exchange-traded funds (ETFs). articles.title: Vitalik Buterin Aims to Streamline Ethereum’s Layer-2 Interoperability
articles.description: Vitalik Buterin has proposed a universal light client for Ethereum’s rollup-centric ecosystem, leveraging EIP-3668 to improve decentralization and efficiency.

articles.title: Abu Dhabi’s Mubadala Invests $436M in BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF
articles.description: Abu Dhabi’s Mubadala Sovereign Wealth Fund invested $436M in BlackRock’s Bitcoin ETF, becoming the seventh-largest known holder of IBIT.

articles.title: Strategy’s STRK Becomes Top US-Listed Security in Two Weeks
articles.description: Strategy’s STRK has become the top-performing US-listed perpetual security, with trading volume seven times higher and strong demand driving its rise.

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Bulls in Action—Is a New Upside Run Beginning?
articles.description: Cardano price started a fresh rally above the $0.750 zone. ADA is now consolidating gains and might aim for a fresh move above the $0.80 level. ADA price started a fresh rally above the $0.720 and $0.750 levels. The price is trading above $0.750 and the 100-hourly simple moving average.
